twitter_thread: 71% of fitness gear I bought was identical, just with different logos. $2k wasted.
Dior's $100 yoga pants didn't convince me, but Lululemon's $20 mat did.
Fitness gear with excessive branding costs 30% more on average.
Fitbit's built-in accelerometer tracks sleep 99% accurately. Look for this feature.
I've used 15 fitness trackers, only 3 tracked sleep. The rest were useless.
What's the most overhyped fitness gear you've bought? #fitnessgear #workout
Is Dior's fitness gear worth the $500 price tag just for the logo?
pack.linkedin: I spent $2k on 7 fitness gear sets and found that 71% were identical, with only the logo differing. A $20 Lululemon yoga mat outperformed a $100 Dior alternative. Fitness gear with excessive branding costs 30% more on average. When choosing a fitness tracker, look for built-in accelerometers like Fitbit's, which track sleep 99% accurately. What's your take on the fitness gear industry - are people getting value for their $1.4bn annual spend?
